title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to the DPRK: Simon Wood
body: "Mr Simon Wood has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea in succession to Dr David Ellis OBE, who will be retiring from the Diplomatic Service. Mr Wood is taking up his appointment during September 2025.  Curriculum Vitae     Year Role     2023 to 2024 FCDO, Deputy Director, North-East Asia and China Directorate   2022 FCDO, Deputy Director, Strategic Communications   2017 to 2021 Rio de Janeiro, HM Consul General   2014 to 2017 FCO, Head, Crisis Management Department   2010 to 2014 Copenhagen, Deputy Head of Mission   2007 to 2010 Tokyo, 1st Secretary and Head of Media and Communications   2004 to 2006 FCO, Head, Cyprus and Greece Section, Europe Directorate   2001 to 2004 Tokyo, 2nd Secretary Trade Promotion   1998 to 2000 FCO, Desk Officer, Europe Directorate   1998 Joined FCO      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
